name: Survey Template
description: Survey Template - Marketing template for research professionals
instructions: How to Use This Survey Template Step 1: Plan Your Survey Go to "Survey Planner" tab and enter survey details including name, objective, target audience, sample size, method, timeline, and budget. Step 2: Design Questions Use the "Question Bank" tab to explore pre-built questions or add custom questions. Review categories like NPS, satisfaction, demographics, etc. Step 3: Build Your Survey In "Survey Builder" tab, select questions from the bank and customize for your specific survey. Add skip logic and mark required fields. Step 4: Deploy Survey Configure response collection method (Online/Phon
